unsloth/Qwen3.6-27B-NVFP4.notes: off via top-level `reasoning_effort: "none"`; `preserve_thinking` (toggled with thinking switch) injected via onPayload for multi-turn continuity; returns `reasoning` field

moonshotai/Kimi-K2.7-Code.notes: on/off via namespaced `chat_template_kwargs.thinking` (toggled with thinking switch); `preserve_thinking` (toggled) for multi-turn continuity; onPayload aliases each assistant message's `reasoning` â†’ `reasoning_content` (Kimi's template reads `reasoning_content` but pi-ai sends `reasoning`); returns `reasoning` field. `reasoning_effort` is not emitted (Kimi's template reads namespaced `thinking`, not `reasoning_effort`)

zai-org/GLM-5.2-FP8.notes: off via top-level `reasoning_effort: "none"` (only lever GLM responds to; `enable_thinking`/`thinking`/chat_template_kwargs toggles are ignored); effort `high`/`max` only (minimal/low/medium clamp to `high`); multi-turn continuity via `clear_thinking` (false when thinking on = preserve, true when off = clear; `preserve_thinking` is inert for GLM) injected via onPayload; returns `reasoning` field
